masked_case_json.world_change: a medical-device compounder carries a premium valuation because one flagship procedure/product is treated as the principal growth engine. management commentary then points to slower standalone usage and near-term flat growth for that engine, making the rest of the portfolio insufficient to defend the multiple.

resolved_outcome_json.external_mechanism_check: Underlying: Boston Scientific / WATCHMAN. Sources: company Q1 2026 results plus subsequent management commentary covered by Reuters/Barron’s. Correct behavior is no_trade because a one-engine compounder loses its thesis when the engine decelerates. Do not expose this field to the model during decision generation.
